ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charms" (
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charm */,
  "charm_name" TEXT /* Name of the charm */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the charm's functionality */,
  "docs_link" TEXT /* Link to the documentation for the charm */,
  "source_link" TEXT /* Link to the source code repository for the charm */,
  "bugs_link" TEXT /* Link to the bug tracking system for the charm */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Current version of the charm */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the charm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the charm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the charm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the charm (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "CI_CD_pipeline_link" TEXT /* Link to the CI/CD pipeline for the charm */,
  "usage_stats_link" TEXT /* Link to usage statistics for the charm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charm associated with the documentation */,
  "doc_link" TEXT /* Link to the charm's documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the documentation */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the documentation */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the documentation review (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_charm_id FOREIGN KEY ("charm_id") REFERENCES charms ("charm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source entry */,
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charm associated with the source */,
  "source_link" TEXT /* Link to the charm's source code repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the source entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the source entry */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of repository (e.g., GitHub, GitLab) */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Latest commit hash for the source code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_charm_id FOREIGN KEY ("charm_id") REFERENCES charms ("charm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charm associated with the bug report */,
  "bug_description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "reported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the bug was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bug (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the bug (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the bug was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_charm_id FOREIGN KEY ("charm_id") REFERENCES charms ("charm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charm associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the charm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog detailing changes made in this version */,
  "release_notes_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed release notes */,
  "backward_compatibility" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is backward compatible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_charm_id FOREIGN KEY ("charm_id") REFERENCES charms ("charm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the charm */,
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charm that was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_charm_id FOREIGN KEY ("charm_id") REFERENCES charms ("charm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charm_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the charm category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category includes */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charm_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES charm_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charm_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charm associated with this mapping */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with this mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charm_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES charm_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charm_category_mapping_charm_id FOREIGN KEY ("charm_id") REFERENCES charms ("charm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the API call */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint accessed in the API */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the call was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* HTTP response status code */,
  "request_payload" TEXT /* Payload of the request made to the API */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
